description: Retrieves data from ThreatMiner about a specified file.

outputs.description: File MD5 hash. ThreatMiner.File.SHA1 File SHA1 hash.
outputs.name: ThreatMiner.File.MD5

outputs.description: File SHA256 hash. ThreatMiner.File.Type File type.
outputs.name: ThreatMiner.File.SHA256

outputs.description: ThreatMiner.File.HTTP.Domain HTTP traffic to domain. ThreatMiner.File.HTTP.URL
outputs.name: File analyzed date.

outputs.description: HTTP traffic to URL. ThreatMiner.File.HTTP.Useragent HTTP user agent.
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: Related IP address. ThreatMiner.File.Domains.Domain Related domain name.
outputs.name: ThreatMiner.File.Domains.IP

outputs.description: Used mutexes. ThreatMiner.File.Registry Used registry keys.
outputs.name: ThreatMiner.File.Mutants

outputs.description: Detected AV name. ThreatMiner.File.AV.Detection AV detection.
outputs.name: ThreatMiner.File.AV.Name

outputs.description: File MD5 hash. File.SHA1 File SHA1 hash.
outputs.name: File.MD5

outputs.description: File SHA256 hash. File.Malicious.Detections For malicious files, the total number of detections.
outputs.name: File.SHA256

outputs.description: For malicious files, the vendor that made the decision. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: File.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: The indicator type. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type

outputs.description: The actual score. DBotScore.Reliability Reliability of the source providing the intelligence data.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score
